# Project Zeta

Experimental ML platform.

## Status

Cancelled - October 2023

## Overview

Project Zeta was an experimental machine learning platform. It was cancelled due to shifting priorities.

## Reason for Cancellation

- Market conditions changed
- Resources needed for Project Alpha
- Similar functionality available via third-party

## Lessons Learned

- Better market validation needed upfront
- Smaller proof-of-concept before full commitment
